demo_timestamps.description: Using Autodesk Forma on a coffee farm, including shadow simulation and comparing different layout proposals.
Using APS to extract data from field images, combined with custom mobile apps for location data.

client_mentions.name: Lúbert Coffee
client_mentions.context: A specialty coffee brand located in Colombia.

ai_technologies.name: Generative Design
ai_technologies.context: AI recommending tree layouts using generative design.

summary: The video discusses integrating advanced digital design and traditional agriculture to create climate-resilient agroforestry. It demonstrates using Autodesk Forma and APS for simulating shadow coverage on a coffee farm and collecting field data to optimize agricultural practices. The goal is to create data-driven, climate-resistant systems for improved agricultural sustainability.
